text.title: puppeteer-output-capture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for puppeteer-output-capture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling page.pdf() immediately after page.goto() without waiting for the full render.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: JavaScript-rendered content (charts, fonts, lazy-loaded images) may not have finished when goto resolves. Add waitForSelector on a key element or waitForNetworkIdle before calling pdf().
